core_arcs.arc_summary: Blake's ongoing pursuit of spiritual understanding, shifting from external achievement to internal peace.

core_arcs.arc_name: Transition from External Success to Inner Fulfillment
core_arcs.arc_summary: Shift from defining himself through achievements to valuing inner peace, vulnerability, and authenticity.
language_used: living in a state of flourishing
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Highlights his evolving values, emphasizing vulnerability and internal validation.

core_arcs.arc_summary: Midlife as a period of profound change, resilience, and authentic growth through setbacks and reflection.
language_used: impact, a different form of ROI
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Shows Blake overcoming setbacks with resilience, emphasizing connection and growth.

core_arcs.arc_summary: From external achievement to creating lasting social impact, emphasizing purpose and contribution.
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Defines his core motivation as service, impact, and legacy.

inner_life_patterns.pattern_name: Seeking Connection with the Spiritual & Human

evidence_quotes: connect and communicate with supernatural aspects

inner_life_patterns.description: Life-changing shifts through sacred practices and self-reflection.
evidence_quotes: radically altered many aspects of my life

inner_life_patterns.description: Desire for calmness, presence, and genuine fulfillment over external success.
evidence_quotes: live every day as if it might be my last

inner_life_patterns.description: Feeling authentic and whole through inner work and purpose-driven actions.

Deep exploration of self and spirit
